VENUES
Host your next event with us
Two premium venues available for private and public hire. Arrange a free viewing before you commit, or go ahead and book. Contact management on Discord for viewings.
The Penthouse
Luxury rooftop venue with skyline views. Perfect for private parties, business events, and celebrations.
Base rate$50,000
Public event add-on+$10,000
Short notice (0-3 days)+$25,000
Book the Penthouse
The Racetrack
Dirt and gravel circuit for races and vehicle events. Non off-road vehicles are not suitable for this track.
Base rate$25,000
Public event add-on+$10,000
Short notice (0-3 days)+$25,000

Private events require a guest list submitted at least 48 hours before the event. Public events receive an event marker — no guest list needed. Casino staff are included at no extra charge. Contact management on Discord after submitting your booking request.

CAREERS
Work with us
Think you'd be a good fit for the Diamond Casino & Resort? We're always looking for dedicated people to join the team.

Security, croupiers, bartenders, valets — we have positions across the floor. If you've got the work ethic and the attitude, we've got a place for you.
